who: HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
offer: For HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, payroll discrepancies cause employee dissatisfaction. We provide monitoring instead of manual payroll checks and audits.
problem: Discrepancies in payroll data leading to employee dissatisfaction and potential legal issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers
Indie Hackers discussions on payroll workflows
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video
Community forums for HR tools sharing
try_it: Let users try real-time payroll alerts and dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing payroll data
